subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon Mine horizon! The entire world is thunderstruck by this Most Exalted Word, save whom thy Lord willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی افقی جمیع عالم از این کلمه علیا منصعق الا من شاء ربک هو
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
